title: Missing capability check before privileged action
summary: Administrative actions should verify user capabilities with current_user_can() before execution.

detection.notes: Heuristic detection of privileged operations without capability checks in the same line or nearby context.

guidance.why_it_matters: Without capability checks, any authenticated user could perform administrative actions, leading to privilege escalation vulnerabilities.
guidance.fix: Wrap privileged operations with current_user_can() checks.
guidance.false_positive_risk: High. The heuristic cannot see function scope or earlier checks. Review manually.
